reviews.author: Dante van der Vegt
reviews.text: Honestay is an absolute gem and a highly recommended place to visit if you are in the area. From the moment we arrived, we were impressed by the welcoming atmosphere and the excellent value it offers. The overall vibe of the place is lovely, and the experience is matched by the delicious food available. Eating well without breaking the bank is a huge plus here, as the prices are very affordable. We slept in one of the rooms/dormitory sections and were comfortable. The beds were nice and the rooms were spacious—perfect for resting up after a long day of exploring. What truly sets Homestay apart is its fantastic location. Being within easy walking distance of the beautiful local waterfall makes it an ideal base for adventurers and sightseers. This is definitely a place you should add to your travel list. We will be back!

reviews.author: Michel Morin
reviews.text: This was one of the most amazing home stays we have seen. The hosts were so kind and polite. The meals were very tasty and enjoyable. The property is one of the nicest we have seen, very peaceful and calm landscape over looking a beautiful valley!

reviews.author: quốc huy phạm
reviews.text: That's amazing homestay, so nice, the owner is so kind, you can accept the stream so close, the Vietnamese traditional food is so delicious. The peaceful emotion, best view, good landscape with many flower.

reviews.author: Alicia Davis
reviews.text: This is such an amazing place to stay while on the Ha Giang loop. One of the best meals I’ve had in Vietnam. The gardens and the tranquility of this place to sit and have a coffee or cold drink after a long day of riding. So close to the waterfall you can walk there 10min away. The rooms are comfortable and very cute. I highly recommend this place to anyone doing the Ha Giang loop.

reviews.author: Thomas Shepherd
reviews.text: This ecolodge was one of the most gorgeous places that I stayed during my trip through Vietnam. The rooms are clean and comfortable. The food was amazing and accommodating to vegans. The reception from the host was warm and welcoming.

reviews.author: Aurelio Schmid
reviews.text: We had an amazing stay at the ecolodge during our Ha Giang trip. Beautiful garden and great food, with the waterfall just a few minutes away. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: karla gamboa
reviews.text: Stayed here during the Ha Giang loop and it has been a lovely experience! It’s 5 minutes from a waterfall and surrounded by beautiful mountains!! 10/10 service, food, and scenery Highly recommend

reviews.author: Sum Family
reviews.text: Such a nice place and service. Every conner is a-ready-for-photo. Food is fresh everyday. When you book a meal, they give you a free bottle of corn wine. The owner làdy is sooo beautiful.

reviews.author: Nat Paff
reviews.text: Amazing spot nestled in the mountains! The hosts were very welcoming, the room was spotless and cozy, and the meals were delicious. Waking up to those breathtaking mountain views each morning was truly memorable. Such a tranquil setting – I absolutely loved my stay!

reviews.author: Tobias Steiner
reviews.text: Fantastic location right in the mountains. I was warmly welcomed by the hosts, the room was clean and comfortable, and the food was excellent. On top of that, waking up to the stunning mountain views in the morning was unforgettable. A very peaceful place – I truly enjoyed my stay!

reviews.author: Julia Clo
reviews.text: Pachidua Ecolodge is one of the most beautiful places I've seen in Vietnam, a blend of tranquility and warmth. The staff is attentive and very kind. Thank you for this wonderful experience.

reviews.author: Nick
reviews.text: A very peaceful home stay, you can either take private rooms or a bunk in a shared dorm. The grounds surrounding are lush and well kept with lots of cats and dogs around. The home stay is just a short walk away from a waterfall and the staff are not only welcoming with their energy and happy water but also serve up incredible local dishes for dinner and breakfast. Saigon beers are 25,000 VND

reviews.author: Nikki Griffin
reviews.text: Such a beeeeautiful beautiful place! After a long day on the bikes on the Loop drive I was expecting to be roughing it a little bit, but this turned into the most beautiful place I’ve stayed all year on my travels. So peaceful and the owners are so kind. ❤️

reviews.author: Lucas
reviews.text: It was a really great day, beautiful landscape, and the lodge is really great beds are really comfortable and the food is really good. The service was also the best. Thank you for everything.

reviews.author: Denise Lombardo
reviews.text: Amazing place, surrounded by the green of the mountains. Rooms are well equipped, and have beautiful decorations. Food is also delicious! Really loved it my time here 🥰

reviews.author: Ben Gaviola
reviews.text: Beautiful home stay with Mountain View’s and a waterfall nearby. Food was great, and they have a peaceful walking trail around the property.

reviews.author: Vietnam Eric Hòa
reviews.text: If you're looking for an escape from the city, Pachidua Ecolodge is a truly special find. It's not a five-star resort, but it’s something better: a place that feels completely authentic. The lodge’s design perfectly matches the mountainous landscape. The bungalows, made with natural materials, feel cozy and blend right in. It’s the perfect spot to sit back and simply enjoy the stunning views of the valley. The staff are the heart of this place. They are genuinely kind and helpful, not just in a professional way. They go out of their way to make you feel at home, whether it’s helping with directions or bringing you a warm cup of tea on a chilly evening. The food is simple yet delicious, with fresh, local ingredients. Eating a warm meal after a day of hiking feels incredibly rewarding here. While it lacks modern luxuries like air conditioning (which you won't need) and perfect Wi-Fi, this is part of its charm. It forces you to disconnect and fully immerse yourself in the natural beauty. In short, Pachidua Ecolodge is an honest, peaceful retreat. I will definitely be back and highly recommend it to anyone seeking a genuine experience in Ha Giang.

reviews.author: Gopi Mehta
reviews.text: It’s such an amazing and natural place. Loved my time here with serene views. Great hospitality warm people. Would love to return.

reviews.author: Sabine Fritsch
reviews.text: This is one of the most amazing places I’ve stayed at in Vietnam. My room was looking out on an incredible mountain range and there’s a beautiful waterfall only a 10 minute walk away. The ambience is serene and the rooms are very clean, the food absolutely delicious. Thuy and his family are so lovely and helpful, do yourself a favour and spend at least a night here while on the Ha Giang loop!

reviews.author: Jethro Hoo
reviews.text: Owners are very nice, beds are nice too as the provide a mosquito net! Also, the meals provided were great!

reviews.author: Marjolein Hendrikse
reviews.text: Well built home stay with spectacular views. The dining area and dorms are well set up, basic, clean and functional. The bunk beds are big and mosquito nets provide some privacy.The hosts are super friendly and the food is amazing!

reviews.author: Federico Bosi
reviews.text: Beautiful eco lodge in the middle of the mountains. Great people, amazing food and comfy rooms!

reviews.author: Dennis Channon
reviews.text: Very nice stay. Staff were very friendly and the food was lovely.

reviews.author: Jess Fromont
reviews.text: Amazing stay here. The scenery is gorgeous, the bedrooms were so cozy and pretty - with the best views ! The food was amazing and the alcohol cheap ! Thank you for having us

reviews.author: po vibol
reviews.text: It is a beautiful hotel on a small hill and surrounded by mountain and rice fields. The room is well decorated with garden , well equipped

reviews.author: Jasper Hart
reviews.text: Was blown away by how luxurious this place feels, serene views, close to waterfall, beautiful rooms and amazing food and people.

reviews.author: Tadeas Janik
reviews.text: Very nice place with kind people, great food and calm beautiful environment. The surroundings are amazing.

reviews.author: Julia Meijer
reviews.text: Wow! This is for real the most beautiful place I have been during my travels. Its a homestay 5 minutes walking from the waterfall, with beautiful wooden cabins in a lush garden full of flowers. Mai Anh did everyting posdible to accomodate us, we had the most amazing dinner with views over the ricefields. Thanks a million times!!!!

reviews.author: נעמה קפר
reviews.text: Very nice place! The dinner was good the staff were nice and welcoming. The beds are a little bit stiff But overall we had a good experience the view is amazing, the design of the place is gorgeous and it’s 5 min walk from the waterfall

reviews.author: tiffany zhao
reviews.text: The host upgraded us to a private room without asking and was sooo sweet. Beautiful place!!!
